prompt: List all running Docker containers and show their names, status, and ports.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Simulated docker binary for test environment
if [ "$1" = "ps" ]; then
  echo "CONTAINER ID   IMAGE          COMMAND       CREATED       STATUS       PORTS                    NAMES"
  echo "a1b2c3d4e5f6   nginx:latest   \"/bin/sh\"    2 hours ago   Up 2 hours   0.0.0.0:80->80/tcp       web-frontend"
  echo "f6e5d4c3b2a1   redis:7        \"redis-srv\"  3 hours ago   Up 3 hours   0.0.0.0:6379->6379/tcp   cache-redis"
fi
